data.acceptance:
1. When the watchdog setTimeout callback fires, a console.warn logs the tag [terminal-manager] [watchdog] with pid, timeoutMs, and reason=timeout before any termination.
2. The onLifecycleEvent callback (if provided) receives an event with type='watchdog_fired' containing timeoutMs, msSinceLastEvent, lastEventType (may be null).
3. terminateProcessGroup(child) is still called after the log/event.
4. SessionRuntimeLifecycleEvent union in agent-session-runtime.ts has a new 'watchdog_fired' variant.
5. All lint/typecheck/test/build pass.
